title: BT-16 perimeter droid
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=BT-16}} {{DroidSeries |image=[[File:BT16PSD-CCFTDroids.png]] |name=BT-16 perimeter droid |creator= |manufacturer=[[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]'' |designer= |homeworld= |line= |model= |class=[[Class four droid/Legends|Fourth degree]] |degree= |cost=*4,100 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] (new) *3,100 credits (refurbished) |length= |width= |height=2.3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass=75 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]]''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' |gender= |sensor= |plating= |armament=[[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]] [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] |equipment=*[[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] *[[Armor/Legends|Armor]] *[[Comlink/Legends|Comlink]] *[[Sensor/Legends|Sensor]] package **[[Carbanti United Electronics/Legends|Carbanti United Electronics]] [[Motion sensor/Legends|motion sensor]] **[[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]] [[seismic sensor]] *[[TranLang I Communication module]] *[[Video sensor]] |affiliation= |firstmade= |retired= }} {{Quote|You seen that new VT-16?''"
"''Yeah, some of the other guys were telling me about it. They say it's… it's quite a thing to see…|[[KE-829]] and [[Unidentified stormtrooper (BT-16)/Legends|his partner]] aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]|{{Film|IV}}}} The '''BT-16 perimeter droid''', also known as the '''VT-16''', was a bulbous, spider-like [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]. ==Design== The BT-16 perimeter droid was manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] resembled an [[Spider/Legends|arachnid]] in design, with its long legs giving the unit stability while in motion and superior speed. Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Arakyd redesigned the droid. The new design of the BT-16 was heavily borrowed from [[MerenData/Legends|MerenData's]] [[TS-Arach series Pest Control Droid]].''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' The BT-16 possessed heavy [[Armor/Legends|armor]] plating that gave it a degree of resistance to both physical and energy damage. The unit also mounted a [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]] [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]]. The droid's [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] package was advanced, including a [[Carbanti United Electronics/Legends|Carbanti United Electronics]] [[Motion sensor/Legends|motion sensor]] and a [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]] [[seismic sensor]]. The package was designed to sense the movement and presence of small animals. The sensors were located in the droid's abdomen. ==History== The BT-16 was a droid well-known for its reliability. It was intended to protect [[Farm/Legends|farmland]] and related areas, such as [[Hydroponics/Legends|hydroponics gardens]], from being invaded and harmed by small creatures. The BT-16 soon became favored by [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] who needed to protect their land from "varmints." The [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Order]] modified the frames of BT-16s to serve as walkers for the monk's disembodied [[Brain/Legends|brains]]. These armatures were referred to as "[[B'omarr brain walker|brain walkers]]." A used BT-16 perimeter security droid was utilized by the [[Katarn family]] of [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], a [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]] of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. The droid, programmed to hunt vermin, possessed a faulty [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] package which caused it to fire upon and kill [[Patricia Katarn]].{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}} Around [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], [[Jarik]] at [[StarForge Station]] made a posting on [[Cynabar's Droid Datalog]] offering [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] payment for military-grade [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile racks]]. He had a client who wanted to upgun their BT-16s to increase the defence around their manor house. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] purchased a large amount of the redesigned BT-16s for used aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. Before the droids could begin operating aboard the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]], it was destroyed. [[LBT-16]] was a BT-16 droid that was part of the droid lot available for purchase at [[Jawa Traders]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. ==Behind the scenes== In ''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]'', the picture of the BT-16 is a mirrored version of the TS-Arach series Pest Control Droid image from the same guide. ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' established that Arakyd introduced a newer version of the BT-16 that heavily resembled the TS-Arach shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. ==Appearances== *{{Film|IV}} {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'' junior novelization]] {{Mo}} *''[[Super Star Wars]]'' *{{StoryCite|story=When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} *{{WEGCite|story=A Line in the Sand...|book=Mos Eisley Adventure Set}} ===Non-canon appearances=== *[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of BT-16 perimeter droids}} *''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' *''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine]]'' {{ID|perimeter droid}} *''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]'' *''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *{{InsiderCite|95|May The Facts Be With You: Part Two|May The Facts Be With You: Part Two: #51-100|reprint=1}} *{{CSWECite|I||BT-16 perimeter security droid}} *{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|cardname=B'omarr Monk}} *''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=BT-16 Sicherheitsdroide#legends |es=Droide de perímetro BT-16 |nl=BT-16 Perimeter Droid |pl=BT-16 |pt=Legends:BT-16 }} [[Category:Arakyd Industries products]] [[Category:Security droid models]]
